Name: Sea Waves
Description: Controls a procedural sea/ocean surface simulation, including wave generation, choppiness, shading, reflection, and simulation timing behavior.

Fields.Name: Bubble Diffuse Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture ID for the diffuse appearance of sea foam and surface bubbles used in wave interaction visuals.

Fields.Name: Bubble Mask Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture ID defining where foam/bubbles are visible, typically controlling placement and masking of foam effects.

Fields.Name: Normal Texture ID
Fields.Description: Normal map used to simulate small surface wave detail and fine water surface perturbations.

Fields.Name: Light ID
Fields.Description: Reference to the light source used for water shading and specular reflection calculations.

Fields.Name: Time Rate
Fields.Description: Multiplier controlling the speed of wave animation and procedural time progression.

Fields.Name: Enable Sea Waves
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the procedural sea wave simulation.

Fields.Name: Wave Angle
Fields.Description: Primary direction of wave propagation in degrees or radians depending on engine convention.

Fields.Name: Wavelength Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the size of waves, affecting distance between wave crests.

Fields.Name: Amplitude Scale
Fields.Description: Controls wave height, increasing or decreasing overall wave intensity.

Fields.Name: Enable Choppy Waves
Fields.Description: Enables sharper, more physically detailed wave peaks instead of smooth sinusoidal waves.

Fields.Name: Wind Angle
Fields.Description: Direction of wind influencing wave direction and secondary wave behavior.

Fields.Name: Wind Speed
Fields.Description: Strength of wind affecting wave energy, scale, and motion intensity.

Fields.Name: Wave Amplitude
Fields.Description: Base amplitude of waves before additional scaling factors are applied.

Fields.Name: Wave Number Coefficient
Fields.Description: Coefficient controlling wave frequency distribution and overall wave density.

Fields.Name: Blend Begin Depth
Fields.Description: Depth at which surface wave blending with underwater visuals begins.

Fields.Name: Blend End Depth
Fields.Description: Depth at which full underwater blending is applied.

Fields.Name: Reflection Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum reflection intensity for water surface specular reflections.

Fields.Name: Reflection Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum reflection intensity used at grazing or low-reflectivity angles.

Fields.Name: Reflectance
Fields.Description: Overall reflectivity of the water surface controlling how strongly it mirrors the environment.

Fields.Name: Shininess
Fields.Description: Controls specular highlight sharpness on the water surface.

Fields.Name: Reflection Distortion Scale: Near
Fields.Description: Amount of distortion applied to reflections at close viewing distances.

Fields.Name: Reflection Distortion Scale: Far
Fields.Description: Amount of distortion applied to reflections at distant viewing ranges.

Fields.ID: Sea Wave FFT Tex Tiling Size
Fields.Name: FFT Texture Tiling Size
Fields.Description: Controls tiling scale of FFT-based wave simulation textures.

Fields.Name: Bump Map Tiling Size
Fields.Description: Tiling scale of bump maps used for fine surface detail.

Fields.Name: Basis Height
Fields.Description: Base sea level height used as reference for wave displacement.

Fields.Name: Depth Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum depth used for depth-based blending and shading transitions.

Fields.Name: Area Max
Fields.Description: Defines maximum area of influence for wave simulation or rendering bounds.

Fields.Name: Transparent Depth
Fields.Description: Depth threshold controlling water transparency and subsurface visibility.

Fields.Name: Border Feed Depth
Fields.Description: Depth used to blend wave simulation at scene boundaries.

Fields.Name: Border Bubble Depth
Fields.Description: Depth controlling where foam/bubbles appear near water edges.

Fields.ID: Sea Wave Border Bubble Flat Scale
Fields.Name: Border Bubble Flat Scale
Fields.Description: Controls flattening and scaling of bubble effects near borders.

Fields.Name: Border Wave Scale
Fields.Description: Adjusts wave intensity near scene boundaries.

Fields.Name: Shallow Water
Fields.Description: Color tint applied to shallow water regions.

Fields.Name: Deep Water
Fields.Description: Color tint applied to deep water regions.

Fields.ID: Sea Wave Use Inner Simulation Time
Fields.Name: Use Inner Simulation Time
Fields.Description: Enables independent internal time step for wave simulation.

Fields.ID: Sea Wave Enable Average Inner Simulation Time
Fields.Name: Enable Average Inner Simulation Time
Fields.Description: Smooths simulation timing by averaging internal time steps.

Fields.ID: Sea Wave Enable Fixed Inner Simulation Time
Fields.Name: Enable Fixed Inner Simulation Time
Fields.Description: Locks simulation to a fixed timestep for deterministic wave behavior.

Fields.Name: Fixed FPS
Fields.Description: Frame rate used when fixed simulation timing is enabled.
